title: Chapter 111
content:
Chapter 111: 111 | Aftercare & Analytics

I did.

Choked her while my hips slammed forward. While milk flooded my mouth and spilled down her chest. While her legs kicked and her hands clawed at my shoulders.

She came a second time. Harder than before. Her whole body convulsing under me.

Then a third. That one hit her so hard she went completely silent for five full seconds before screaming my name loud enough to echo.

By then I’d switched to her left breast. Drained both of them dry. My stomach felt distended. Heavy with the weight of Silver essence sloshing around inside me.

But my cock was still hard. Still driving into her over and over. Still chasing the release that felt tantalizingly close but not quite there yet.

Belle looked up at me through glassy eyes. Face bright red. Hair stuck to her forehead and temples in sweaty clumps.

"Finish inside."

"I will."

"No. I mean." She grabbed my face with both hands. Forced me to look directly at her. "Finish inside.

Now.

Please. I need it. I need the buff."

I nodded.

Increased my pace. Faster. Harder. Chasing the edge.

Slap. Slap. Slap. Slap.

The bed shook underneath us. The headboard slammed against the wall with rhythmic thuds that matched each brutal thrust. Belle’s moans turned into screams. High-pitched. Desperate. Completely unrestrained. The sound echoed off the Sanctum walls like we were in a cathedral dedicated to debauchery.

I felt it building. That familiar coil of pressure at the base of my spine. Tightening. Twisting. Almost ready to snap.

Almost there.

Almost.

"Belle."

"

Do it.

"

I thrust deep. As deep as I could. Buried myself completely inside her and held there. My hips pressed flush against hers.

And came.

Spurt. Spurt. Spurt.

Heat flooded through me in waves. My vision whited out for a second. Maybe two. When it cleared Belle was staring at the ceiling. Her chest rising and falling in rapid, shallow breaths.

"Holy shit."

"Yeah."

"I felt that."

"Good."

"No like. I felt that." She turned her head to look at me. Her eyes were wide. "Your cum. Inside me. It’s. It’s warm. Really warm."

"That’s normal."

"Is it though? Because nothing about this is normal." She gestured vaguely at the Sanctum around us. "Nothing about any of this is normal."

Fair point.

I pulled out slowly. Watched my cum leak out of her in thick white rivulets. Mixing with her own wetness. Dripping down onto the black silk sheets that weren’t real because nothing in this dimension was real except the two of us.

The system pinged.

◆ ESSENCE TRANSFER COMPLETE ◆

Target:

Belle Fox

Session Results:

Total Consumed: 1.5 cups

Points Earned: 240 pts

Lifespan Gained: +2 days 9 hours

BUFF APPLIED:

[Divine Empowerment]

Duration: 24 hours

Treasure Sense: Bronze → Silver

Detection Range: 15m → 30m

Value Assessment: Improved

Physical Stats: +25%

ABILITY ALREADY STOLEN

Treasure Sense acquired previously

No additional theft available

Belle gasped. Her whole body stiffened like she’d been hit with an electric current.

"Oh. Oh wow."

"You feel it?"

"Yeah. My ability. It’s. It’s so much stronger." She sat up. Looked around the Sanctum with new eyes. "I can sense. Everything. The fake city outside. The bed frame. Your. Your watch."

"What about it?"

"It’s worth twelve thousand dollars. Custom made. Swiss movement. Serial number engraved on the back." She paused. Blinked. "Why am I getting that level of detail?"

I looked down at my bare wrist.

"I’m not wearing a watch."

"I know. But you have one. Somewhere. Probably your dorm room. It’s in the top drawer of your desk, actually. Black leather case with a gold clasp." She touched her temple like she was reading something invisible. "Serial number ending in 447. Why am I getting coordinates?"

"Silver rank Treasure Sense doesn’t need line of sight. You’re reading value signatures across the entire academy grounds. Distance, composition, precise location. At Gold you’ll start getting market prices in real time."

"That’s completely ridiculous."

"That’s the buff working."

She looked at me for a long moment.

Then down at herself.

At the dried milk on her stomach. The mess between her legs. Her thighs were shaking. I could see my cum still leaking out of her in slow pulses, mixing with her own fluids and dripping onto the sheets.

"I still can’t process that we actually did all of that."

"Having second thoughts?"

"No." She pushed herself off the bed. Her legs nearly gave out. She caught herself on the bedpost. "But I desperately need a shower. Maybe sleep for twelve hours. And I’m going to eat an entire pizza by myself."

"Sanctum’s got three and a half minutes before it kicks us out. Then we’re back in reality."

"Right. Your magical sex dungeon runs on a timer." She walked over to the floor-to-ceiling window, watching the fake city lights shimmer in the distance. Pressed her palm against the glass. "This is genuinely my life now. Getting railed by a milk-stealing freak in a pocket universe while my ability gets supercharged."

"There are objectively worse situations to be in."

"Name one that doesn’t involve actual death."

The Sanctum dissolved around us like smoke.

One second we were standing in the luxury penthouse suite with its king bed and city view. The next we were back in my cramped dorm room with its twin bed and stolen textbooks.

Belle grabbed her discarded sports bra off the floor. Started pulling her clothes back on. Her movements were slow, careful. Like her whole body ached.

I found my shorts. Pulled them on.

"So," she said while tugging her shirt down over her chest. "Same arrangement next week?"

"Tomorrow if you want to keep the buff active. It’s only twenty-four hours. Miss a day and you drop back to Bronze."

"Right. Daily maintenance sessions." She worked her leggings up her legs. "With you. And eventually Naomi if she says yes."

"Only if you both agree to it. I’m not forcing anything."

She nodded slowly.

Finished getting dressed.

Walked toward the door.

Her hand was on the handle when she stopped.

Turned back around to face me.

"Monroe?"

"Yeah?"

"Thank you. Genuinely."

"For what specifically?"

"For actually doing it properly this time. For spending all that time getting me off first. For making me cum twice before you even tried to fuck me." Her voice got quieter. "Most guys don’t bother with that part."

"You’re welcome."

She smiled.

It was small. Real. The first completely genuine expression I’d seen from her all night.

"Also your dick is legitimately enormous and I’m probably going to walk funny tomorrow."

"That wasn’t intentional."

"I know. But I still enjoyed it." She pulled the door open. Cool hallway air rushed in. "I’ll see you in the dining hall for breakfast. Assuming I can still walk by then."

Then she stepped out into the corridor and was gone.
